name: default
description: Machine-readable sibling of the code-understanding walkthrough: a title, the question being answered, a components array (path, role), an ordered callSequence array (location, description, optional code), and a flat references array. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands each single template element into one entry per component/step/reference.

slots.description: The question being answered, plus a short summary of the mechanism.
Component file path. The components array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per component.
What the component is responsible for.
File:line location for the step. The callSequence array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per step.
What runs at this step and why it matters.
Representative source snippet for the step.
Related files worth reading; one entry each.

shape.callSequence[]: { location: string (file:line), description: string, code: string (optional) }
